---
title: 'County Map — Global Entrepreneurship Index Septiles (2022)'
description: 'U.S. county choropleth showing septile classification of the global entrepreneurship index, 2022 vintage'
date: '2026-05-12'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/capital-one-business-demographics-global-eship-index-2022-septiles-map/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Entrepreneurship
tags:
  - PCA
  - Entrepreneurship Index
  - County-Level
  - National
  - Map
  - Septile
  - "2022"
image: global_eship_index_2022_septiles_map.jpg
chart:
  title: 'Global Entrepreneurship Index Septile Map (2022)'
  chartType: map
  interactive: false
  source: U.S. Census Bureau
  sourceUrl: https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/acs
  featured: false
producedBy: capital-one-business-demographics
usesDatasets:
  - american-community-survey
  - census-bds
usesPackages:
  - cori-data-bds
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![U.S. county choropleth — septile classification of global entrepreneurship index (2022)](./global_eship_index_2022_septiles_map.jpg)

## Overview

This choropleth map displays the septile classification of the global entrepreneurship index across all U.S. counties for the 2022 vintage. The global index applies a single kernel PCA model to all counties regardless of rural or metro status, enabling a nationally consistent ranking. Counties are divided into seven equal-population groups from lowest (1) to highest (7) entrepreneurship activity. The 2022 map is one of two temporal snapshots (alongside the latest-available vintage) used to assess index stability across years.

## Key Findings

- The 2022 global index septile map establishes the baseline geographic pattern for year-over-year comparison.
- Rural counties in the Northern Plains and Intermountain West tend to cluster in higher septiles relative to their population counts.
- Comparing 2022 to the latest-vintage map (same script) reveals which county rankings are stable vs. volatile across annual index updates.

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/analysis/global_eship_index_map_revised.Rmd` in the Capital One Business Demographics Analysis project.
